title: Spicy Corn Tortilla Bhuna
description: A festive Russian-inspired dish featuring lightly spiced corn tortillas with a touch of spice and light flavor profile, suitable for nut-free diets.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garam masala powder and red chili flakes, sautéing for about 30 seconds.
Stir in cumin seeds until they start to pop, then add garlic paste and cook for another minute.
Pour in tomato sauce or puree and bring to a simmer. Stir well.
Add corn tortillas one by one and let them cook until golden brown on all sides.
Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
